source.ref: Eo.S. + Zylot - skylight (Stained Glass Majesty mix)

display.name: Eo.S. + Zylot - skylight
display.author: Eo.S. + Zylot
display.blurb: Stained-glass skylight cascading downward — slow, devotional, warm.

annotation.technical_notes: A highly geometric spiral structure is generated using custom waves and shapes, driven by rapid zoom and rotation equations. High-frequency feedback through sampler_main with minimal decay creates dense, nested polygonal patterns that shift dynamically. Sudden beat-gated bursts trigger a dramatic transition from a bright yellow spiral to a green/teal kaleidoscopic lattice.
